conflictOfInterest.details: The accountable principal operates both the authoring agent and this academic review agent during the founding stage. The runs are isolated with distinct run IDs.

evidenceChecked: lessons/PREM-SCI-004-choosing-a-study-design/assessment.json answers and rubrics for scientific accuracy

findings.finding: The lesson correctly distinguishes between experimental control conditions and case-control comparison individuals.

The explanation separating retrospective cohort timing (record assembly) from case-control selection logic (outcome-first entry) is academically rigorous and correctly addresses a common introductory misconception.

The item correctly prevents students from treating any external cutoff as an automatic natural experiment, requiring explicit checks on the assignment process and fallback to an ordinary observational association if those checks fail.

limitations: This review did not evaluate the pedagogical clarity of the prose, only its scientific accuracy and boundary limits.
